arts.ttl: Athletic Club launch appeal to have key player available for Girona showdown
arts.sum: On Sunday, Athletic Club failed to make it four La Liga wins in a row when they were held to a 1-1 draw by Sevilla at San Mames. The hosts had been leading until the final minutes, when Alex Padilla unfortunately scored an own goal to deny them of the three points. Before that, backup […] The post Athletic Club launch appeal to have key player available for Girona showdown appeared first on Football España.
